summary: Shaky bystander cellphone footage of a person walking down a grassy lake bank toward a white SUV that has rolled into the water. Per the tweet, the driver stopped to protest an ICE enforcement and did not put the car in park. Audio is onlooker chatter ('That sucks... Lucy the car got lost'). There is no music, stylized editing, color grade, graphics, or end card.
notable_text: If you're going to stop your car to protest an ICE enforcement... at least put your car into park
